name: com.coachfit.activity.application.service.parser.FitParser
comment:
Parses Garmin FIT binary files using the official Garmin FIT SDK.

Message mapping (per docs/06-sync-engine-spec.md)

  • {@code SessionMesg} → {@link ParsedActivity} summary metrics
  • {@code LapMesg[]} → {@link ParsedLap} list
  • {@code RecordMesg[]} → {@link ParsedStreams} arrays
  • {@code FileIdMesg} → activity name (sport + manufacturer)

Latitude/longitude semicircles are converted to decimal degrees via: {@code degrees = semicircles * 180 / 2^31}

methods.name: parse
methods.comment: Parses raw FIT bytes into a {@link ParsedActivity}.

methods.name: mapSport
methods.comment: Maps Garmin FIT {@link Sport} enum to CoachFit sport strings. Unknown/unmapped sports fall back to "other".

name: com.coachfit.activity.application.service.parser.FitParser$SessionHolder
comment: Mutable holder used inside the lambda listener.
